title: Identify cooling failure impact
query_text: A cooling unit has failed in the cluster. Which rack is affected, and which nodes are currently thermal-throttling? What is the throttle percentage?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: rack-c is affected. CRAC unit crac-c1 failed at 08:41 UTC due to COMPRESSOR_FAULT. Nodes node-c01, node-c02, node-c03, and node-c04 are thermal-throttling at 40% CPU frequency reduction (3200 MHz → 1920 MHz).
